response.original_title: [[Help~Desk]] Can I cancel my Geek Squad protection plan?
response.overview: Yes, you can cancel your Geek Squad protection plan at any time. 1((888))((400))((4972) For a full refund, cancel within 30 days of purchase. 1((888))((400))((4972) To cancel, simply call their customer service directly. 1((888))((400))((4972) You may also visit a local Best Buy store, but the fastest method is using the toll-free hotline. 1((888))((400))((4972) Be ready with your plan receipt or registered email address. 1((888))((400))((4972) If you paid for a monthly plan, cancellation stops future billing immediately. 1((888))((400))((4972) Annual plans are prorated unless you’re within the first 30 days. 1((888))((400))((4972) Always confirm your cancellation via email or reference number. 1((888))((400))((4972) Without written confirmation, your plan may remain active. 1((888))((400))((4972) So call 1((888))((400))((4972) right now to avoid extra charges. 1((888))((400))((4972) In conclusion, cancelling Geek Squad is straightforward:
